steps.description: In the "Input volume" section, select the CT volume for processing.

operations.description: Select the CT volume for processing

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Reference_Segmentation".

operations.description: Create a new segmentation named Reference_Segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Reference_Segment" under "Reference_Segmentation", and set its color to Sage Green.

operations.description: Add and rename Reference_Segment with Sage Green color

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

operations.description: Activate Threshold effect in Segment Editor

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

operations.description: Set threshold range for reference segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

operations.description: Apply Threshold effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

operations.description: Activate Islands effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep selected island" option.

operations.description: Select 'Keep selected island' option

steps.description: In the 2D view, click to select the reference part.

operations.description: Click in 2D view to select the reference part via Islands effect

interaction.placement_instructions: Click in 2D view to select the reference part via Islands effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Moving_Segmentation".

operations.description: Create a new segmentation named Moving_Segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Moving_Segment" under "Moving_Segmentation", and set its color to Cyan.

operations.description: Add and rename Moving_Segment with Cyan color

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

operations.description: Activate Threshold effect for moving segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range. The default value matches the threshold set in Step 5.

operations.description: Set threshold range for moving segmentation (default from step 5)

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

operations.description: Apply Threshold effect on moving segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

operations.description: Activate Islands effect on moving segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep selected island" option.

operations.description: Select 'Keep selected island' option for moving

steps.description: In the 2D view, click to select the moving part.

operations.description: Click in 2D view to select the moving part via Islands effect

interaction.placement_instructions: Click in 2D view to select the moving part via Islands effect

steps.description: In the "Reference segmentation (fixed)" section, select the reference segmentation node.

operations.description: Select the reference segmentation node

steps.description: Click the "3D Reconstruction (reference)" button.

operations.description: Reconstruct 3D model from reference segmentation

steps.description: In the "Moving segmentation (repositioned)" section, select the moving segmentation node.

operations.description: Select the moving segmentation node

steps.description: Click the "3D Reconstruction (moving)" button.

operations.description: Reconstruct 3D model from moving segmentation

steps.description: Click the "Detect fracture surfaces" button.

operations.description: Detect fracture surfaces

steps.description: Click the "Initialize registration" button.

operations.description: Initialize registration

steps.description: Manually adjust the rotation and displacement of the moving part.

operations.description: Manually adjust rotation and displacement of the moving part

steps.description: Click the "Reduction planning" button.

operations.description: Perform reduction planning

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Manually adjust the moving fragment" box. If not, stop here.

operations.description: Ask if manual adjustment is needed, stop if not

steps.description: Manually adjust the moving fragment.

operations.description: Manually adjust the moving fragment

steps.description: Click the "Harden transform into moving fragment" button.

operations.description: Harden transform into moving fragment
